# Typescript Language Server test

# Start acme-lsp server
env ACME_LSP_CONFIG=$WORK/config.toml
acme-lsp -headless &

# Format file
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.ts:'#0'
L -headless fmt
cmp hello.ts after-format.txt

# Definition of "HelloGreeter" constructor
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.ts:'#168'
L -headless def -p
stdout 'hello.ts:.*:class HelloGreeter implements Greeter {'

# References to the method "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.ts:'#83'
L -headless refs
stdout 'hello.ts:.*hello\(\): void;'
stdout 'hello.ts:.*hello\(\): void {'
stdout 'hello.ts:.*g.hello\(\);'

# Type definition of 'g'
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.ts:'#181'
L -headless type -p
stdout 'hello.ts:.*:class HelloGreeter implements Greeter {'

# Signature of the "hello" method call
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.ts:'#188'
L -headless sig
stdout 'hello\(\): void'

# Hover over the call to the "hello" method
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.ts:'#185'
L -headless hov
stdout '\(method\) HelloGreeter.hello\(\): void'

# Implementations of the interface "Greeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.ts:'#14'
L -headless impls
stdout 'hello.ts:.*:class HelloGreeter implements Greeter {'

# Completion in middle of method call "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.ts:'#185'
L -headless comp
stdout 'hello'

# Print all symbols in the file
L -headless syms
stdout 'Greeter'
stdout 'hello'
stdout 'HelloGreeter'
stdout 'main'
stdout '/hello.ts:'

# Query workspace symbols
L -headless wss HelloGreeter
stdout 'hello\.ts:.*:class HelloGreeter implements Greeter {'

# Rename HelloGreeter class to WorldGreeter
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.ts:'#168'
L -headless rn WorldGreeter
cmp hello.ts after-rename.txt


-- hello.ts --
interface Greeter {
	hello() : void; }

class HelloGreeter implements Greeter {
	hello() : void {
        console.log("Hello, 世界"); } }

function main() {
    const g = new HelloGreeter();
    g.hello(); }

main();
-- after-format.txt --
interface Greeter {
	hello(): void;
}

class HelloGreeter implements Greeter {
	hello(): void {
		console.log("Hello, 世界");
	}
}

function main() {
	const g = new HelloGreeter();
	g.hello();
}

main();
-- after-rename.txt --
interface Greeter {
	hello(): void;
}

class WorldGreeter implements Greeter {
	hello(): void {
		console.log("Hello, 世界");
	}
}

function main() {
	const g = new WorldGreeter();
	g.hello();
}

main();
-- config.toml --
[Servers]
	[Servers.tsls]
	Command = ["typescript-language-server", "--stdio"]

		[Servers.tsls.FormattingOptions]
		TabSize = 4
		InsertSpaces = false

[[FilenameHandlers]]
  Pattern = "\\.ts$"
  LanguageID = "typescript"
  ServerKey = "tsls"
